category: Marketing Automation / Funnel Builder / All-in-One Business Platform
description: All-in-one platform that allows entrepreneurs and small businesses to build sales funnels, email marketing, membership sites, and e-commerce stores without coding.
authentication: Email/password login, with optional social login via Google and Facebook.
self_serve: Yes, free trial available, self-serve sign-up, no sales team required.
mcp: Positioned as an affordable all-in-one marketing automation platform targeting small businesses and entrepreneurs, competing with ClickFunnels, Kajabi, Kartra, and Builderall.
buildability: Moderate – offers Zapier integration, webhooks, and limited API for data import/export, but no SDK or extensive developer docs.
main_blocker: Limited public API and developer resources restrict deep integration and automation capabilities.
